justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted the user's initial request for "after lunch around 13" as 13:00-14:00 and then correctly understood the follow-up request for "around 9 or 10 AM" as 9:00-11:00.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent effectively handled the unavailability of the first requested time by proactively suggesting checking for other times on the same day, leading to a successful booking in the next turn.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent efficiently processed all user requests without asking for redundant information or making unnecessary turns.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was smooth and professional, with the agent quickly understanding and fulfilling the customer's requests.
justifications.recovery_quality: The agent maintained full context and intelligently expanded the search when the initial time was unavailable, leading to a successful booking without any loss of information.
